histogram_plot.caption: Histogram of number_of_address across 5,630 customers. Orange = mean, purple = median. The gap between them confirms skew direction: mean > median ⇒ right-skewed, mean < median ⇒ left-skewed.

boxplot.caption: Box plot reads as: box = 25th–75th percentile (the middle 50%), line inside box = median, whiskers extend to 1.5 × IQR, dots beyond = outliers. Large vertical separation between the two medians = strong churn predictor. Box overlap that is still high means the feature alone does NOT distinguish the two groups.

mann_whitney_u.narration: Mann-Whitney U = 2,121,980. Marginally significant (p = 0.0305). This non-parametric test asks whether churn and retained customers have the same distribution for this feature.

cohens_d.narration: Cohen's d = +0.12 — negligible effect size. Values are higher in churners (positive shift).

outliers.narration: 4 outliers by the IQR rule (0.1% of rows). p99 = 11.00, max = 22.00. Severity: minimal. No additional outlier treatment needed beyond Stage 1's sanity clip. Raw values are safe to feed into any model family.

narrative.distribution: Distribution is strongly right-skewed — most values clustered on the low end with a long right-side tail (skewness = +1.09). Mean (4.21) > median (3.00) — confirms the right skew.
narrative.boxplot: Churned median (3.00) is 0.00 lower than retained median (3.00). No meaningful separation — this feature alone does not distinguish churners from retained customers.
narrative.separation: Mann-Whitney U = 2,121,980. Marginally significant (p = 0.0305). This non-parametric test asks whether churn and retained customers have the same distribution for this feature. Cohen's d = +0.12 — negligible effect size. Values are higher in churners (positive shift).
narrative.outliers: 4 outliers by the IQR rule (0.1% of rows). p99 = 11.00, max = 22.00. Severity: minimal. No additional outlier treatment needed beyond Stage 1's sanity clip. Raw values are safe to feed into any model family.

recommendation.transform_reason: distribution close to symmetric OR outlier mass minimal
recommendation.rationale: Signal: negligible (|Cohen's d| = 0.12, p = 0.0305). Transform: none — distribution close to symmetric OR outlier mass minimal. Outlier handling: no additional outlier treatment.
